docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE, A CALIFORNIA CORPOR ATION AS TO DEFENDANT BERRIOS, DENISE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
